arguments.summary: Added email validator to src/lib/validators/field-validator.ts. Uses regex to validate email format, passes empty values (composable with required). All 8 tests pass including 4 new email tests.
arguments.final_answer: Added email format validation to src/lib/validators/field-validator.ts. The email ValidatorFn uses regex validation and allows empty values (combine with required for mandatory email fields). All 8 tests pass.
